app.description: Plan trips with friends and keep them as memories.

common.loginRequired: You need to be logged in.

settings.heading: Settings
settings.displayNameHelp: Your default display name when joining a trip (existing trip names won't change).

join.invalidBody: The link may be wrong or has been deactivated.
join.invitedTo: You've been invited to a trip
join.enterName: Enter your name to join. No account is needed to join as a guest.
join.guestDisabled: Guest join is disabled. Please join with Google.

tripDetail.importHelp: Drafts extracted from email. Review and confirm them to turn them into expenses.
tripDetail.privateTodoHelp: Turn on the lock icon to make a to-do visible only to you.

members.heading: Members
members.editOwnName: You can edit your own display name.
members.adminCanRemove: As an admin, you can also remove other members.
members.onlyAdminCanRemove: Only admins can remove other members.
members.leaveBody: You can rejoin via the invite link.

trips.heading: Trips
trips.empty: You haven't joined any trips yet.

createTrip.title: Title
createTrip.settlementCurrencyHelp: The currency used for totals and splitting costs (not the currency of your destination).
createTrip.shorterWarning: ⚠ Because the dates are shorter than the source trip, some events won't be copied.

landing.tagline: Plan trips with friends and keep them as memories.
landing.joinHint: If you just want to join without signing in, open the shared link directly.
